architecture_findings.canonical_model: PARTIAL: indicator/territory/period/value shape fits conceptually, but current territory and period dimensions are too narrow for Eurostat codes and quarterly periods.
architecture_findings.fact_table_design: PARTIAL: fact_observation grain can represent values if period and territory dimensions are fixed; current period uniqueness by year would collapse quarterly facts, and territory iso3_code naming is wrong for Eurostat geo codes.
architecture_findings.ingestion_framework: PARTIAL: source-specific parser/writer is still appropriate; a generalized framework remains premature, but a repeated raw->normalized->report contract is emerging.
architecture_findings.metadata_architecture: PARTIAL: meta.source/dataset_release/pipeline_run can record endpoint/checksum/filters, but provider dimension dictionaries and code labels need a first-class metadata home before more sources accumulate.

na_item.B1GQ: Gross domestic product at market prices

s_adj.NSA: Unadjusted data (i.e. neither seasonally adjusted nor calendar adjusted data)

license_note: Eurostat public no-key dissemination API; bounded internal architecture spike.
non_recommendations: Do not production-harden Eurostat ingestion in TASK-020.
Do not add a generalized source framework yet.
Do not write Eurostat rows into PostgreSQL until schema decisions for period and territory are accepted.
Do not broaden beyond one dataset and four observations for this spike.

recommended_schema_changes.change: Replace or extend curated.dim_period natural key from (frequency, period_year) to (frequency, period_code), with period_code text such as 2023-Q1 plus optional year/quarter/month/start/end fields.
Rename or extend curated.dim_territory.iso3_code to source_territory_code/territory_code plus code_system so non-ISO3 provider codes like DE, FR, EU27_2020, EA20 are not mislabeled.
Add metadata storage for provider dimension/code dictionaries, either meta.provider_code_list or dataset_release.metadata conventions, before broad codelist reuse.
When promoting a third source, add source-specific staging.eurostat_namq_observation; do not build a generalized ingestion framework yet.
Consider normalizing seasonal_adjustment into attributes for fact grain; keep as attribute_set initially.
